text:
'Saikyou Degarashi Ouji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi' Unveils Additional Cast, Staff, First Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Tanba's Saikyou Degarashi Ouji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi: Munou wo Enjiru SS Rank Ouji wa Koui Keishousen wo Kage kara Shihai suru (The Insipid Prince's Furtive Grab for the Throne) light novel unveiled additional cast, staff, and a first promotional video on Monday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere in July 2026. Cast Erik Lakes Adler: Atsushi Tamaru (Mahoutsukai no Yakusoku) Gordon Lakes Adler: Ryouta Takeuchi (Mahoutsuk...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Kyoto Animation Adapts 'Umi ga Hashiru End Roll' Manga for Movie in 2027
Kyoto Animation announced an anime movie adaptation of John Tarachine's Umi ga Hashiru End Roll (The Credits Roll Into the Sea) manga on Monday, scheduled to open in theaters in 2027. Taichi Ishidate (Violet Evergarden, City the Animation) is directing the anime at Kyoto Animation. Shochiku is distributing the movie. Tarachine serialized the slice of life manga in Mystery Bonita magazine from October 2020 to November 2025. Akita Shoten published the eighth volume in July 2025, with the nin...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
New 'Ghost in the Shell' TV Anime Unveils Additional Staff, Third Promo
The official website for the new Koukaku Kidoutai (The Ghost in the Shell) television anime revealed additional staff, a third key visual (pictured), and a third promotional video on Monday. The new TV anime will premiere on July 7 at 11:00 p.m. on Kansai TV and Fuji TV affiliates. Staff Art Director: Emi Katanosaka (Watashi no Shiawase na Kekkon) Art Supervisor: Osamu Masuyama (Dungeon Meshi) Color Design: Satoshi Hashimoto (Vinland Saga) Director of Photography: Hikari Itou (Sanda) Editing: Ki...
